code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          if count == 0
            nums = [cur, 0]
          else if count == 1
            nums = [nums[0], cur]
          end
          count = count + 1
          cur = 0
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if count == 0
      nums = [cur, 0]
    else if count == 1
      nums = [nums[0], cur]
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  mut a = nums[0]
  mut b = nums[1]
  while b != 0
    let t = a % b
    a = b
    b = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{a}")
end
